notices: This audit does not alter legal content or promote any form.
This audit is not visual approval.
This audit is not production ready.
This audit is not live routed.
No private source file was modified by this audit.

taxonomyDefinitions.has_reference_doc: Folder includes an agent/reference PDF or similar reference material.
taxonomyDefinitions.has_wilma_reference: Folder includes a Wilma/reference RTF or Wilma-named reference.
taxonomyDefinitions.has_official_blank_pdfs: Folder includes at least one likely blank official PDF, excluding reference/instruction-only PDFs.
taxonomyDefinitions.has_official_source_html: Folder includes captured official-source HTML pages.
taxonomyDefinitions.has_modeled_forms_only: Folder has references/HTML/RTF/DOC/DOCX but no likely blank official PDF.
taxonomyDefinitions.missing_official_pdf: A referenced form or family is not identifiable as a local blank official PDF.
taxonomyDefinitions.missing_form_family: A broader form family remains absent locally.
taxonomyDefinitions.source_reference_mentions_form_not_prese: A local source, state-pack catalog, or captured HTML implies a form that is not clearly present.
taxonomyDefinitions.downloaded_since_last_audit: Newly copied missing-form PDFs are present in the real state folder.
taxonomyDefinitions.needs_local_rescan: Inspection artifacts should be regenerated because private files changed since the last inspection report.
taxonomyDefinitions.needs_official_source_confirmation: Local files may satisfy the gap but need title/source/revision confirmation before catalog or mapping use.
taxonomyDefinitions.needs_web_research: Local files remain insufficient after this rescan and external official-source checking is needed.
taxonomyDefinitions.complete_enough_for_current_shadow_stage: Local materials are sufficient for current shadow-stage research documentation, but not for lifecycle promotion, renderer wiring, or production use.
taxonomyDefinitions.custom_pleading_strategy_source_supporte: Local statute/reference/handout material supports a custom pleading or statutory petition strategy for the current shadow-stage audit, but the file set does not prove from an official source that no statewide official blank form exists.

inputs: private/Nationwide Record Clearing/ state folders (read-only scan; Missing Forms, Missing Folder 2 Extracted, Missing Folder 2, __MACOSX, and duplicate LegalEase California  folder excluded)

statesMovedOutOfNeedsWebResearch.why: The copied se (1)-se (5) PDFs now provide local blank-form candidates for the previously missing Florida seal/expunge packet components; remaining work is official-source confirmation and title normalization.
ccdccr078.pdf and dccr071.pdf are now in the Maryland folder, satisfying two previously high-priority missing Judiciary forms.
The marijuana expungement petition PDF is now in the Massachusetts folder; the remaining time-based expungement item needs local/source confirmation, not broad web research.
EXP103_Current.pdf is now in the Minnesota folder, completing the EXP101-EXP107 local family captured by the state-pack catalog.
CR370 judgment/order is now in the Missouri folder, satisfying the previously high-priority missing order form for the 610.140 packet.

CR-180 and CR-181 blank PDFs plus the Judicial Council instruction PDF are now locally present in LegalEase California/; remaining work is source/title/revision confirmation because the older HTML captures live in the separate LegalEase California  folder.
The JDF sealing/expungement PDF family is now locally present in LegalEase Colorado/; remaining work is route-by-route source/title/revision confirmation and currentness review.

AOC-CR-287, AOC-CR-297, and AOC-CR-298 PDFs and instruction PDFs are now locally present in LegalEase North Carolina/; remaining work is source/title/revision confirmation and deciding whether AOC-CR-288 is in scope.

Local statute/reference material includes Petition to Expunge Records and Order to Expunge Records text and supports a custom pleading/statutory strategy for the current shadow-stage audit. The local files do not prove from an official source that no statewide blank form exists, so remaining work is official-source confirmation rather than true web research.
CR-266/CR-267 PDFs and summaries are now locally present in LegalEase Wisconsin/; remaining work is source/title/revision confirmation and whether both forms are required for supported workflows.

Local handout/reference material supports a petition/proposed-order custom pleading strategy and warns that local templates may exist. The local files do not prove from an official source that no statewide blank form exists, so remaining work is official-source confirmation rather than true web research.

needsOfficialSourceConfirmation.whyItAppearsMissing: Previously missing packet forms are now locally present, but filenames are generic and must be matched to official titles/rules before catalog use.
needsOfficialSourceConfirmation.requiredFor: state pack; official PDF mapping; user filing packet
needsOfficialSourceConfirmation.recommendedNextAction: Inspect the five local se PDFs, map each to official title/form role, and record source URL/access/revision metadata.
